review_title: I’m very happy with our switch to Assure!
description: Very responsive. Easy to work with. Have offered many more services that we did not have available from our last payroll company.
author: kim Z.
pros: The customer service has been excellent. They are very responsive and they made the transition from our previous company so easy. Highly Reccomend!
cons: No complaints thus far. There are always a few things to work out when you switch service providers, but they have been extremely responsive and accommodating.

author: Becca U.
pros: Quick responses, system is user friendly and secure.
cons: When the system times out in the middle of working on something.

description: We did not stay with asure for every long and changed over to a system that can handle multi-state and more advanced payrolls.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is easy to use for a small business, but was very much out of compliance with multi-state taxation.
cons: The system was a small business platform with no real single database for what we were looking for. The tax engine was not compliant. Reporting was minimal. In comparison to other systems, the pricing should have been much less to be competitive.

description: Its been quick, easy, convenient, which is what i want in a payroll and tax company. They even helped me look into cal savers information as a new business that I was unaware of.
author: Jennifer C.
pros: They are always available to answer phone calls and your questions and are very quick to make changes if they are needed.
cons: Nothing really, i havent personally had any issues with them at all

description: Easy to use for owners and managers and for the employee
author: Cheyenne W.
pros: That you can see the sick days and the app is easy to use
cons: When you need to write a note in the app.You cannot see it easily on the manager side

description: We have had to overcome a few bumps in the road with them and we are still at a point we are trying to get to the next level, there was a change in who was helping us again so we somewhat had to start over. But I am remaining confident that we will get there as they promised.
author: Michelle S.
pros: We have been with them since it was Payroll Maxx. The people that work there are always very nice and willing to work with you. They seem to genuinely care about your company not just a name in the system.
cons: The change of our contacts that do our payroll. We have had a new person most every year.

description: Overall, I would use it for my businesses. My days are very busy and require the utmost attention in many ways. Using this tool is like have 2 more employees that work for me!
author: Corey F.
pros: I liked its easy comprehension and practical usage. I have several businesses and it is crucial that certain aspects are made easier. This definitely aids in that.
cons: It took me a few times to navigate, but is to be expected. Doing taxes, bookkeeping and payroll isnt always the most pleasurable tasks, but they have to be done.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I has turned out to be great! I am very pleased with my new customer rep. Wasn't happy when the old one retired and no one told me and I was hanging out there without one.
author: Diane S.
pros: Once I got the hang of the program it is pretty easy to use. I also have a good representative that responds back in a timely manner.
cons: Training doesn't teach you enough when starting because it isn't user friendly and there is no manual.

review_title: Payroll Service for My Small Business
description: Assure is a service that works well for my small business. Their flexibility has worked well for us and provides a cost effective way of handling all legal aspects of our payroll processing.
author: Louis B.
pros: They provide a user friendly interface with excellent training. Follow up support is available as needed. Friendly and professional personnel.
cons: None at this time. They have modified their system over the time we have used them and made it better each time.

description: Totally Great in all areas of explaining, assisting and provide any information that is requested or need.
author: Charles W.
pros: They are local and ALWAYS answer the phone and willingness to assist about any question/issues that we may have.
cons: I do NOT have anything bad or least to say about them.

description: Poor experience. I do not recommend using this software. It is impossible to reach someone for any type of help.
author: Kimberlee C.
pros: There was nothing really good about this program. It was not user friendly. Our accountants dealt with it.
cons: The interface was not user-friendly. My staff got so angry at it that they would come to the office for us to explain how to use it.

description: Positive. No matter who takes my calls or emails, everyone is well versed in my question or at least can point me in the correct person who can answer my questions.
author: Shelley P.
pros: Someone always is available to take my call and answer my questions. Email replies are always prompt.
cons: A bit pricey for my small business. There is also often a turn over of help so I don't always keep the same representative.

description: It has been very positive and everyone is helpful. Elaine is my specialist and she really looks out for me.
author: Luci B.
pros: They do everything! I just give them the information and Elaine makes sure it is carried out.
cons: Nothing. I really have no complaints about Asure. We were with Payroll Maxx and now Asure its been 8 years.

author: Karisa J.
pros: Generally, I have received a lot of responsive feedback when I have questions or need assistance.
cons: I do not have a lot of interaction with the person that does my payroll, and sometimes it is hard to communicate with her.

author: Nicole M.
pros: Can't think of much. It was better before our smaller payroll company was bought out by Asure...now there are plenty of online options for easily running payroll ourselves.
cons: Super challenging to work with: hard to get immediate and clear communication on things, frequent mistakes, etc. Customer service is typically not very friendly and professional. It is more expensive and time consuming to do my payroll here than using an online service.

description: Same as above- they are all friendly, knowledgeable, and helpful.
author: Kudd R.
pros: Very friendly and helpful and have taken care of every issue whenever I've had questions or needed help.
cons: The only reason I'm not likely to recommend is that I never talk with anyone that might use the service.

description: Very kind and friendly staff. Very helpful with making things go smooth
author: Sarah W.
pros: How helpful everyone is and how the get back to you right away.
cons: At first it is a little confusing on switching over.

description: None since I don't know Tax Management and I think I will like the WHOLE payroll system.
author: Lisa A.
pros: I love my rep [sensitive content hidden]. I think the Payroll system will be good.
cons: No being informed when I was taken over by Asure of the benefits I already had then being sold an upgrade of which I did not need because I already had what I was asking for. Now that I have been introduced to what I have had for over a year or more I think I will really like it. Tax Management? What is this? Again this brings up something that I must have and have no idea I do. Any chance I can learn this too.

description: Great communication; accurate completion of tasks; responsive to our questions and changes we need to make. Cost is reasonable.
author: Ben F.
pros: Staff is very kind and responsive. Payroll is done accurately and on-time. Reports are easy to access and understand. A quality operation!
cons: We love everything about Asure. I do not have any complaints nor have I found any short comings with their service.

description: Been the worst payroll provider I've ever dealt with. We will be finding another payroll provider in the very near future.
author: JEFFREY S.
pros: Absolutely nothing! Worst payroll provider ever!! Only reason I gave one star is because it's required to move on.
cons: Everything, Sales guy [sensitive content hidden] is just a sales guy and doesn't support what he's selling at all. During the transition to Asure payroll, they didn't set up my Federal tax deduction correctly and I am now going to be over $4,000 short come tax time. We met with them and pleaded for them to make things right but they refused to do so.

description: Our overall experience has been positive. We have recently went through a change in payroll expert & he has been great!
author: ISHALA M.
pros: The fast communication between myself & my payroll expert.
cons: Nothing negative to say. Everything has been great & we are well taken care of.

description: Absolutely satisfied with the company!
author: Sharry S.
pros: Our payroll processing and [sensitive content hidden]! She is awesome!
cons: Sometimes when I need to change payroll dates because of Holidays sometimes tends to be an issue.

description: They have been incredible since we began using their services.
author: Aaron K.
pros: Their customer service is incredible! They are always ready to help as needed.
cons: The only thing that can be a little glitchy, is the speed of the website.

description: Very bad would not recommend. Big and little mistakes made
author: Heather S.
pros: I did not like anything about asure payroll.
cons: Getting back to me in a timely manner. Many mistakes made.

description: Overall, I enjoy using Asure. However, there needs to be more accountability for errors.
author: Tracy M.
pros: Asure is easy to use and has a fast turn around time.
cons: When mistakes are made it is hard to get a resolution.
